kilauea_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY VOLCANO ACTIVITY NOTIFICATION
kilauea_notices.message: HVO Kilauea ORANGE/WATCH - Precursory low-level eruptive activity before episode 48 of the ongoing Halemaʻumaʻu eruption began around 5:41 p.m. HST on May 30. It was preceded by frequent small spatter explosions within the north vent beginning on the evening of May 28.

mauna_loa_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY MONTHLY UPDATE
mauna_loa_notices.message: HVO Haleakala GREEN/NORMAL - No activity of concern for Haleakalā.
